  • Method Details

    • findAll

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<TaskResponse> findAll()

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<TaskResponse> findByProject(Long projectId)

    • findById

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public TaskResponse findById(Long id)

    • create

      @Transactional @LogActivity(type=TASK_CREATED, message="Utworzono zadanie") public TaskResponse create(TaskRequest request)

    • update

      @Transactional @LogActivity(type=TASK_UPDATED, message="Zaktualizowano zadanie") public TaskResponse update(Long id, TaskUpdateRequest request)

    • updateStatus

      @Transactional @LogActivity(type=TASK_STATUS_CHANGED, message="Zmieniono status zadania") public TaskResponse updateStatus(Long id, TaskStatusRequest request)

    • delete

      @Transactional @LogActivity(type=TASK_DELETED, message="Usuni\u0119to zadanie") public void delete(Long id)
